requirement_topic.en: Morocco EV Policy, National Mobility Plan, and Market Context
requirement_topic.zh: 摩洛哥EV政策、国家出行计划与市场背景
requirement_topic.zht: 摩洛哥EV政策、國家出行計畫與市場背景

summary.en: Morocco has adopted a National Electric Mobility Plan (Plan National de Mobilité Electrique) under the Ministry of Energy Transition and Sustainable Development, targeting expanded EV adoption and public charging infrastructure deployment. ONEE and AMEE coordinate with private operators on charging concession frameworks. Imported EV chargers must comply with Moroccan customs requirements (ADII) including HS code classification under HS 8504.40 (static converters) or HS 8544 (wiring sets) and applicable import duties. EV chargers are subject to Control at Origin under the Moroccan Verification of Conformity (VoC) programme, requiring a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) from an approved inspection body before shipment to Morocco; exporters should confirm current product-list status with an approved body (e.g. Bureau Veritas, SGS, Intertek) before shipment. Public procurement of charging infrastructure is increasingly governed by IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 specifications in tender documents, consistent with Morocco's EU-aligned technical standards practice.
summary.zh: 摩洛哥在能源转型与可持续发展部主导下制定了国家电动出行计划（Plan National de Mobilité Electrique），目标是扩大EV普及和公共充电基础设施部署。ONEE和AMEE就充电特许经营框架与私营运营商协调。进口EV充电设备须遵守摩洛哥海关（ADII）要求，包括HS 8504.40（静止变换器）或HS 8544（线束）HS编码归类及适用进口关税。EV充电设备受摩洛哥合格验证（VoC）计划下原产地管控约束，须在出口摩洛哥前取得经认可检验机构出具的符合性证书（CoC）；出口商应在出货前向经认可机构（如Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek）确认当前产品清单状态。公共充电基础设施采购招标文件中越来越多采用IEC 61851和IEC 62196规格，与摩洛哥对标欧盟技术标准的做法一致。
summary.zht: 摩洛哥在能源轉型與可持續發展部主導下制定了國家電動出行計畫（Plan National de Mobilité Electrique），目標是擴大EV普及和公共充電基礎設施部署。ONEE和AMEE就充電特許經營框架與私營運營商協調。進口EV充電設備須遵守摩洛哥海關（ADII）要求，包括HS 8504.40（靜止變換器）或HS 8544（線束）HS編碼歸類及適用進口關稅。EV充電設備受摩洛哥合格驗證（VoC）計畫下原產地管控約束，須在出口摩洛哥前取得經認可檢驗機構頒發的符合性證書（CoC）；出口商應在出貨前向經認可機構（如Bureau Veritas、SGS、Intertek）確認當前產品清單狀態。公共充電基礎設施採購招標文件中越來越多採用IEC 61851和IEC 62196規格，與摩洛哥對標歐盟技術標準的做法一致。

standards_or_laws: Plan National de Mobilité Electrique du Maroc
Moroccan VoC programme — Control at Origin (Certificate of Conformity required before shipment for EV chargers in regulated categories)
Loi 13-09 and Loi 47-09 frameworks for grid-connected EV infrastructure
ONEE / AMEE EV charging concession programme specifications

summary.en: Chinese EV charger exports to Morocco are classified under HS 8504.40 or HS 8544 depending on the product configuration. Chinese export documentation (CCC certificate, GB/T 18487 test report) does not substitute for Moroccan import conformity requirements or ONEE/AMEE concession programme IEC standards compliance. No China-Morocco FTA preferential tariff rate applies as of 2026.
summary.zh: 出口摩洛哥的中国EV充电设备视产品配置归类于HS 8504.40或HS 8544。中国出口文件（CCC证书、GB/T 18487测试报告）不能替代摩洛哥进口合规要求或ONEE/AMEE特许经营计划IEC标准合规。截至2026年，中摩之间无自贸协定优惠关税税率。
summary.zht: 出口摩洛哥的中國EV充電設備視產品配置歸類於HS 8504.40或HS 8544。中國出口文件（CCC證書、GB/T 18487測試報告）不能替代摩洛哥進口合規要求或ONEE/AMEE特許經營計畫IEC標準合規。截至2026年，中摩之間無自貿協定優惠關稅稅率。

gap.en: Engage a Moroccan customs broker to confirm the correct HS classification and current import duty rate for the specific EV charger product (AC wallbox, AC public charger, or DC fast charger). Confirm with an approved VoC inspection body whether the product requires a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) under the Moroccan Control at Origin programme before shipment. Confirm whether the national EV mobility plan or ONEE/AMEE concession programme requires compliance with IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 as a tender condition. Build IEC-route certification into the product development plan for the Morocco-export variant before bidding on public projects.
gap.zh: 应委托摩洛哥报关行确认特定EV充电设备产品（交流壁挂式、交流公共充电桩或直流快充桩）的正确HS编码归类和现行进口关税税率。应向经认可的VoC检验机构确认产品在出货前是否须取得摩洛哥原产地管控计划下的符合性证书（CoC）。确认国家电动出行计划或ONEE/AMEE特许经营计划是否将IEC 61851和IEC 62196合规列为招标条件。在竞标公共项目前，应将IEC路径认证纳入摩洛哥出口型号的产品开发计划。
gap.zht: 應委託摩洛哥報關行確認特定EV充電設備產品（交流壁掛式、交流公共充電樁或直流快充樁）的正確HS編碼歸類和現行進口關稅稅率。應向經認可的VoC檢驗機構確認產品在出貨前是否須取得摩洛哥原產地管控計畫下的符合性證書（CoC）。確認國家電動出行計畫或ONEE/AMEE特許經營計畫是否將IEC 61851和IEC 62196合規列為招標條件。在競標公共項目前，應將IEC路徑認證納入摩洛哥出口型號的產品開發計畫。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory customs compliance; IEC 61851 and IEC 62196 compliance is de facto mandatory for public-procurement EV charging projects under ONEE/AMEE concession framework; national plan targets create growing demand pressure
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese export requires standard customs export documentation and CCC (for domestic sales); CCC and GB/T 18487 are not accepted for the Morocco market

source.publisher: Ministère de la Transition Energétique et du Développement Durable (MTEDD), Morocco

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Morocco's national EV mobility plan creates growing demand for IEC 62196 and IEC 61851 compliant chargers. EV chargers are subject to Control at Origin under the Moroccan VoC programme — confirm whether a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) is required before shipment. Chinese exporters should develop a Morocco-spec variant with IEC connectors and IEC-route certifications before bidding on public charging infrastructure projects.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 摩洛哥国家电动出行计划为符合IEC 62196和IEC 61851的充电设备创造了持续增长的需求。EV充电设备受摩洛哥VoC计划下原产地管控约束——应确认出货前是否须取得符合性证书（CoC）。中国出口商在竞标公共充电基础设施项目前，应开发具有IEC插座和IEC路径认证的摩洛哥规格型号。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 摩洛哥國家電動出行計畫為符合IEC 62196和IEC 61851的充電設備創造了持續增長的需求。EV充電設備受摩洛哥VoC計畫下原產地管控約束——應確認出貨前是否須取得符合性證書（CoC）。中國出口商在競標公共充電基礎設施項目前，應開發具有IEC插座和IEC路徑認證的摩洛哥規格型號。
